name: Crossfire
description: A Dahl Bouncing Betty variant that scatters extra child grenades across a wide area for excellent crowd control. It can tear through clustered spawns, but the secondary blasts can easily catch you if it lands too close. Its bullet spray does not hurt allies, and compared with Bouncing Bonny it throws out child grenades a little faster in exchange for slightly lower damage, with the added quirk that it can start releasing them while still in mid-air.
notes:
It can roll with any elemental accessory, but it cannot spawn with Homing Sticky, Lobbed Sticky, or Longbow Sticky delivery.

There is also an item card bug with fuse time: the part that displays 1.0 seconds actually behaves as a 0.0-second fuse. The red text references the small-unit tactics phrase "find, fix, flank, finish."

special.description: Fires a child grenade in a random direction every 2.5 seconds.
special.title: Find, fix, flank, finish!
